intro:
The central problem with dating apps in 2026: fake profiles, bots, and scams erode trust. Profile verification is the solution — but most apps make it optional or hide it behind a subscription.

On Embir, selfie verification is available at signup for all users. Human moderation reviews every report.

comparisonTable.embir: Human team + review of every report

sections.title: Why verification changes the experience
sections.content: A verified profile means the person confirmed their identity with a real-time selfie. It doesn't eliminate all bad behavior, but it creates significant friction for fake accounts and bots. On Embir, verified profiles are prioritized in discovery. You see people who made the effort to verify first.
highlights: Selfie verification = significant barrier to bots
Human moderation = fast action on reports

verdict: If verified profiles are your priority in a dating app, Embir is the best choice in 2026: free selfie verification for all, systematic human moderation, and verified profiles prioritized in discovery.
ctaText: Verified profiles, real people — join Embir

faq.a: Selfie verification at signup: you take a photo in a specific pose that confirms you're the person in your photos. Human moderators review every report.
Yes. Selfie verification is free and available to all users.
Yes. Verified profiles have priority in the discovery algorithm.
